title: Cambridge C1 Advanced — Listening
instructions: This is a STUB content file. Real questions will be transcribed from cae/CAE Practice test listening.docx in Priority 1.

parts.title: Part 1 — Multiple choice (STUB)
parts.instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1-6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

audio.note: Audio will auto-play. You will hear each extract twice within the audio file.

questions.prompt: 1. What is the speaker's main point?

options.text: It is more complicated than expected.
It is more popular than expected.

parts.title: Part 2 — Sentence completion (STUB)
parts.instructions: You will hear a student called Josh talking about his trip to South Africa. For questions 7-14, complete the sentences with a word or short phrase.

questions.prompt: Josh's group planned to check out a particular region after a __________ that had occurred there.

parts.title: Part 3 — Multiple choice long interview (STUB)
parts.instructions: You will hear an interview with two journalists talking about their work. For questions 15-20, choose the answer (A, B, C or D).

questions.prompt: 15. What does Jenny say about the story which made her name?

options.text: She'd been on the lookout for just such a lucky break.
She resented colleagues trying to take the credit for it.
She wasn't actually responsible for the libeled article.
She asked for a more prestigious job in the aftermath of it.

parts.title: Part 4 — Multiple matching (two tasks, STUB)
parts.instructions: You will hear five short extracts in which people are talking about changing their jobs.

taskGroups.instructions: Task 1 — For questions 21-25, choose from the list A-H what reason each speaker gives for changing their job.
Task 2 — For questions 26-30, choose from the list A-H how each speaker feels about their new job.

options.text: delighted by a change in lifestyle
relieved the initial uncertainty is over
